nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mbulu white-eye
nodes.summary: The Mbulu white-eye (Zosterops mbuluensis) is a bird species in the family Zosteropidae. It is found in southern Kenya and northern Tanzania. The Mbulu white-eye was formerly treated as a subspecies of the montane white-eye (Zosterops poliogastrus). When a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2014 found that it was more closely related to the Abyssinian white-eye (Zosterops abyssinicus), the Mbulu white-eye was promoted to species rank. It is monotypic. References
